# [\#3356 Issue](https://github.com/koalaman/shellcheck/issues/3356) `closed`: Documentation request: increased visibility for Ignore + wish list for auto-generated ignore lines

#### <img src="https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/535962?u=25169d3b9eb48c088a907296f9bdd653845cb2e2&v=4" width="50">[iconoclasthero](https://github.com/iconoclasthero) opened issue at [2025-11-12 15:13](https://github.com/koalaman/shellcheck/issues/3356):

#### For new checks and feature suggestions
- [X] https://www.shellcheck.net/ (i.e. the latest commit) currently gives no useful warnings about this
- [X] I searched through https://github.com/koalaman/shellcheck/issues and didn't find anything related

#### Here's a snippet or screenshot that shows a potential problem:
see https://www.shellcheck.net

#### Here's what shellcheck currently says:

ibid.: nothing about ignore.

#### Here's what I wanted to see:

I've been using shellcheck sporadically for a couple yearsjust to help identify problems and do not see a positive cost/benefit in investing time in a full reading of all the documentation for something I use a couple of times a month at most.

I've long been wanting an ignore feature and, lo and behold, there it was referenced on [2188](https://www.shellcheck.net/wiki/SC2188), way down there at the end.

As a suggestion to benefit other casual users of your fine website for scripting assistance, it would be helpful if a link to [Ignore](https://www.shellcheck.net/wiki/ignore) was referenced on the main shellcheck.net page. I think it could reasonably go on the header or footer bar of `ShellCheck Output` without cluttering the UI up too much, perhaps as [Ignore rules...](https://www.shellcheck.net/wiki/ignore) .

Alternately, on lots more of the SC#### wiki pages, particularly info/warning ones. 

**A wish list idea: have an `ignore` link at the end of the info or warning (in the `Output` window) that popped up with the code to ignore that warning so that the user had that ready to go when needed (and include a link to the wiki page).**




#### <img src="https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/243351?v=4" width="50">[brother](https://github.com/brother) commented at [2025-11-13 07:56](https://github.com/koalaman/shellcheck/issues/3356#issuecomment-3526190181):

Please file this issue and possible patch against the web repository instead.
